response.justification: Candidate lacks the critical mandatory skills for this role. C++ experience is minimal and outdated (last significant work in 2014–2015 at National Instruments), with no Windows platform development mentioned. Most importantly, there is no capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking domain expertise. While the candidate demonstrates strong software craftsmanship and has one finance exposure (RIDE Capital), the career trajectory over the past decade has shifted heavily toward web/TypeScript development, not systems-level C++ work required for capital-markets systems.
strengths: Strong software craftsmanship fundamentals with proven TDD, CI/CD, and DevOps practices
15+ years of professional experience with demonstrated leadership (multiple Staff-level roles)
Solid communication skills evidenced by organizing workshops and public speaking
concerns: C++ experience is minimal and severely outdated (2014–2015), far below the required 5–10 years of current proficiency
Zero demonstrated domain expertise in capital markets, fixed income, derivatives, or investment banking
Career trajectory over past 10 years has diverged toward web/TypeScript stack, not systems-level development; no Windows platform experience mentioned

key_factors.factor: Capital markets / fixed income domain knowledge
